name: Saviynt Accounts Deprovisioned on Termination
description: Ensures Saviynt access is revoked when personnel leave the company
query: SELECT s.id, s.username, s.email, e.termination_date FROM saviynt_users s JOIN employees e ON LOWER(s.email) = LOWER(e.work_email) WHERE e.status = 'terminated' AND COALESCE(s.active, true) = true
remediation: Disable or remove accounts for terminated employees within 24 hours. Automate offboarding workflows where possible.
